{{Quote|You see that unmarked routes from Treskov lead farther into the Core. One of these leads to an Imperial star base code-named Tarkin's Fang. The base was sealed and evacuated at the end of the Galactic Civil War, but otherwise remains intact and usable. There is also a large cache of supplies stored at Tarkin's Fang that the Empire intended to use in the event of renewed hostilities.|Admiral Ackbar|<ref name="Destiny">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>}}
'''Tarkin's Fang''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], near the [[Treskov system]]. It was the location of a secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] base. However, the Empire abandoned it at the end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], sealing it up well stocked for use as a base should another war with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] break out.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' incorrectly states that Tarkin's Fang was not a planet, but a base on the surface of [[Ebaq 9]].
